name: Mitch Hedberg
blurb: Surreal one-liner mystic of the absurd non sequitur.
bio: Mitch Hedberg spun surreal one-liners in a mumbling, shades-on delivery, non sequiturs about escalators, frogs, and Sammy Hagar that made him a cult hero. He died at 37, sometimes called the Kurt Cobain of comedy.

timeline.ev: Comedy Central Presents and Strategic Grill Locations

accolades: Cult-classic albums Strategic Grill Locations and Mind Tricks
A revered master of the one-liner
